name: codepack-lz
description: Pack the current VS Code workspace into LLM-ready context (or a lossless envelope) and copy it to the clipboard.

codepackLz.binaryPath.description: Path to the codepack CLI binary.

codepackLz.format.description: Output format. md/xml/txt are LLM-readable; codepack is the lossless transport envelope.

codepackLz.codec.description: Envelope codec when format is codepack.

codepackLz.stripComments.description: Strip comments before packing (readable formats only).

codepackLz.compress.description: Structurally compress source before packing (readable formats only).

codepackLz.countTokens.description: Token counting mode. api uses Anthropic credentials from the environment.

codepackLz.redact.description: Replace detected secrets with [REDACTED:<rule>] instead of blocking the pack.
